prompt: Storyboard frame, aspect 9:16, authentic in-game view of Marble Sort!: 3/4 isometric shot of the full sorting machine — multiple trays at top, light grey conveyor belt moving pastel marbles across the middle, four color-coded drop boxes (lavender, mint, peach, orange) at the bottom with one box glowing orange #FFB13B on a successful match, soft pastel lavender #E5DFFF backdrop, light grey #F0F0F8 machine, clean colorful 3D cartoon style with rounded soft shapes, no characters, HUD shows level progress bar and tap-prompt finger icon, on-screen text overlay 'Match every color' in rounded white-on-orange pill, calm and satisfying lighting.
